subcodes.first_line: O thou who art lost in the desert of the Love of God! Upon thee be the glory of God! The esteemed Haji hath set out bearing a gift for thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گمگشته صحرای محبت الله علیک بهاء الله جناب حاجی عازم و ارمغانی بجهت آن
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love of God
